channel.title: Login Screen on
channel.description: Recent content in Login Screen on

item.title: A few other additions to my Mutt and Desktop setup!
item.description: A few days ago I blogged about my main computer’s configuration files and desktop’s appearance and today I managed to add a few little tweaks to those, they are: Google’s contacts list integrated into Mutt a cleaner and nicer Login screen Curious to know how you can easily integrate your Google’s contacts into Mutt? Well, you should be able to achieve that within a few minutes after reading this small HowTo:
